free_text: Proton and deuteron radiative capture in light nuclei
The 45 MeV cyclotron in Milano the
16O(p,gamma)17F reaction has been measured with a
20 nA proton beam in the Ex range 30-42 MeV
The 15 MV XTU Tandem accelerator in the
Legnaro National Laboratories the measurement of the
16O(p,gamma)17F reaction has been extended down to the
22-30 MeV Ex range with a 15 nA proton beam and the
15N(d,gamma)17O reaction has been measured in the Ex
range 20-40 MeV with a 15 nA deuteron beam
In both experiments a large (24*32 cm) NaI
crystal, 120 cm far from the target, with a 4 pi (9 cm
